addons.name: AI
addons.description: Owns AI provider configuration and the slots used by optional AI capability packages.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Chat
addons.description: Adds the AI chat sidebar and chat route settings.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Semantic Search
addons.description: Adds semantic indexing and retrieval settings.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: AI OCR
addons.description: Adds OCR with a package-owned native sidecar.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Wiki
addons.description: Adds AI-organized Wiki pages and proposal management.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Graph
addons.description: Adds note, Wiki and semantic relationship graph views.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Open Models
addons.description: Browses, downloads and activates local GGUF models.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Codex Connection
addons.description: Connects a ChatGPT subscription and exposes Codex as an AI provider.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sync
addons.description: Adds encrypted Iroh pairing, synchronization and conflict recovery.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Calendar
addons.description: Adds the Elephant calendar workspace and Google Calendar actions.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sites
addons.description: Builds, previews and stops static sites.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Code execution
addons.description: Runs fenced code blocks with selectable local interpreters.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Elephant Tasks
addons.description: A focused task manager with Inbox, Today, Upcoming, Anytime, Someday, Areas, Projects, deadlines, repeats and Logbook.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Template Studio
addons.description: Creates notes from reusable Markdown templates with deterministic date and variable expansion.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Weekly Review
addons.description: Summarizes the last seven daily notes into a weekly review with tasks, highlights and source links.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Writing Statistics
addons.description: Measures words, characters, reading time and recent writing activity across the visible vault.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Vault Changelog
addons.description: Tracks created, modified and deleted Markdown notes between manual snapshots.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Tag Index
addons.description: Indexes frontmatter and inline tags, detects case collisions and writes a navigable tag report.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Markdown Linter
addons.description: Audits Markdown style issues and can explicitly apply a conservative set of safe formatting fixes.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Task Dashboard
addons.description: Aggregates open and completed Markdown tasks from the vault into a generated dashboard.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Broken Links Auditor
addons.description: Finds unresolved and ambiguous wikilinks across the vault and writes a repair report.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: GitHub Release Watcher
addons.description: Tracks releases for configured GitHub repositories and writes a Markdown dashboard.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Notion Markdown Importer
addons.description: Imports a Notion Markdown export from Imports/Notion, cleans UUID names and rewrites internal links.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Inbox Digest
addons.description: Builds a review report from Markdown notes under Inbox/ without modifying the source notes.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Finance Notes
addons.description: Builds a sourced multi-asset market dashboard with per-symbol notes and cached fallback data.
addons.author: ElephantNote

addons.name: Addon Platform Proof
addons.description: Verifies the isolated Worker, app broker, private storage and scoped note list/read/write APIs.
addons.author: ElephantNote
